+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <!-- MACRO DEFINITION -->
+  <xacro:macro name="force_torque_sensor_gazebo" params="name update_rate">
+
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_joint">
+      <preserveFixedJoint>true</preserveFixedJoint>      <!-- in case this is in a fixed joint -->
+      <sensor name="${name}_sensor" type="force_torque">
+        <update_rate>${update_rate}</update_rate>
+        <visualize>true</visualize>
+        <force_torque>
+          <frame>child</frame>
+          <measure_direction>child_to_parent</measure_direction>
+        </force_torque>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+
+  <!-- MACRO DEFINITION -->
+  <xacro:macro name="ros2_control_force_torque_sensor" params="name">
+
+    <sensor name="${name}">
+      <state_interface name="force.x"/>
+      <state_interface name="force.y"/>
+      <state_interface name="force.z"/>
+      <state_interface name="torque.x"/>
+      <state_interface name="torque.y"/>
+      <state_interface name="torque.z"/>

+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <!-- INCLUDES -->
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find pal_urdf_utils)/urdf/sensors/ftsensor.gazebo.xacro" />
+
+  <!-- MACRO DEFINITION-->
+  <xacro:macro name="ft_sensor" params="name parent">
+
+    <!-- FT sensor-->
+    <link name="${name}_ft_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <mass value="0.095000" />
+        <inertia ixx="0.000016" ixy="-0.000001" ixz="0.0" iyy="0.000015" iyz="0.0" izz="0.000027" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="${0.045*0.5}" length="0.0157"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="LightGrey" />
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="${0.045*0.5}" length="0.0157"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_ft_joint" type="fixed">
+      <parent link="${parent}" />
+      <child link="${name}_ft_link" />
+      <origin xyz="${0.0157*0.5 + 0.001525} 0 0" rpy="${90.0 * deg_to_rad} 0 ${90.0 * deg_to_rad}" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <!-- FT tool -->
+    <link name="${name}_ft_tool_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <mass value="0.1" />
+        <inertia ixx="0.0" ixy="0.0" ixz="0.0" iyy="0.0" iyz="0.0" izz="0.0" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0 0" rpy="0 ${90.0 * deg_to_rad} 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="${0.05*0.5}" length="0.00975"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="FlatBlack" />
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0.0 0 0" rpy="0 ${90.0 * deg_to_rad} 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="${0.05*0.5}" length="0.00975"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_tool_joint" type="fixed">
+      <parent link="${name}_ft_link" />
+      <child link="${name}_ft_tool_link" />
+      <origin xyz="0 0 ${0.0157*0.5 + 0.00975*0.5 - 0.001525}" rpy="${-90.0 * deg_to_rad} ${-90.0 * deg_to_rad} 0" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <!-- Gazebo config-->
+    <xacro:force_torque_sensor_gazebo name="wrist_ft" update_rate="100"/>
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--

+  distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
+  WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
+  See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
+  limitations under the License.
+ -->
+
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <!-- INCLUDES -->
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find pal_urdf_utils)/urdf/pi.urdf.xacro" />
+
+  <!-- MACRO DEFINITION-->
+  <xacro:macro name="openni_camera_gazebo_v0" params="name">
+
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_color_frame">
+      <sensor type="depth" name="${name}_frame_sensor">
+        <always_on>true</always_on>
+        <update_rate>30.0</update_rate>
+        <camera>
+          <horizontal_fov>${63.0*M_PI/180.0}</horizontal_fov>
+          <image>
+            <format>B8G8R8</format>
+            <width>640</width>
+            <height>480</height>
+          </image>
+          <clip>
+            <near>0.3</near>
+            <far>8.0</far>
+          </clip>
+          <distortion>
+            <k1>0.00000001</k1>
+            <k2>0.00000001</k2>
+            <k3>0.00000001</k3>
+            <p1>0.00000001</p1>
+            <p2>0.00000001</p2>
+          </distortion>
+        </camera>
+        <plugin name="${name}_frame_controller" filename="libgazebo_ros_camera.so">
+          <camera_name>${name}</camera_name>
+          <ros>
+            <!-- <namespace>${name}</namespace>-->
+            <remapping>${name}/image_raw:=${name}/rgb/image_raw</remapping>
+            <remapping>${name}/camera_info:=${name}/rgb/camera_info</remapping>
+            <remapping>${name}/depth/image_raw:=${name}/depth/image_raw</remapping>
+            <remapping>${name}/depth/camera_info:=${name}/depth/camera_info</remapping>
+            <remapping>${name}/points:=${name}/depth/points</remapping>
+          </ros>
+          <frame_name>${name}_color_optical_frame</frame_name>
+          <min_depth>0.3</min_depth>
+          <max_depth>8.0</max_depth>
+        </plugin>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+<!--  Orbbec Astra based off ASUS Xtion Pro Live-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <!-- INCLUDES -->
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find pal_urdf_utils)/urdf/sensors/openni.gazebo.xacro" />
+  <xacro:include filename="${camera_extrinsic_calibration_dir}/camera_extrinsic_calibration.urdf.xacro" />
+
+  <!-- MACRO DEFINITION-->
+  <xacro:macro name="orbbec_astra" params="name parent camera_model *origin *optical_origin camera_extrinsic_calibration_dir">
+
+    <!-- frames in the center of the camera -->
+    <joint name="${name}_joint" type="fixed">
+      <xacro:insert_block name="origin"/>
+      <parent link="${parent}"/>
+      <child link="${name}_link"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="-0.00936000000 -0.00003000000 -0.00273000000" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.21970000000"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.00000429247" ixy="0.00000000000" ixz="0.00000002565" iyy="0.00000008027" iyz="0.00000000000" izz="0.00000427339"/>
+      </inertial>
+      <!--
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://tiago_description/meshes/sensors/xtion_pro_live/xtion_pro_live.dae" />
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="Grey">
+          <color rgba="0.5 0.5 0.5 1"/>
+        </material>
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="-0.01 0.0025 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <box size="0.04 0.185 0.03"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+      -->
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_optical_joint" type="fixed">
+      <xacro:insert_block name="optical_origin" />
+      <parent link="${name}_link"/>
+      <child link="${name}_optical_frame"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_optical_frame">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.001"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.00001" ixy="0" ixz="0" iyy="0.00001" iyz="0" izz="0.00001"/>
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <!-- frame of camera origin provided by Orbbec, need this intermediate frame for backwards compatibility with xtion_pro_live
+         to reuse same camera origin -->
+    <joint name="${name}_orbbec_aux_joint" type="fixed">
+      <!-- Assuming we have 0.0908 0.08 0.0 from default camera_position, and rotated -90 deg on x.-->
+      <!-- Pending confirmation from Orbbec about the position of the frames, going with old defaults-->
+      <!-- <origin xyz="0.0107 0.008 0.015" rpy="0 0 0" />-->
+      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      <parent link="${name}_link" />
+      <child link="${name}_orbbec_aux_joint_frame"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_orbbec_aux_joint_frame">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.001"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.00001" ixy="0" ixz="0" iyy="0.00001" iyz="0" izz="0.00001"/>
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <!-- frames of the depth sensor -->
+    <joint name="${name}_depth_joint" type="fixed">
+      <xacro:camera_baseline_constants camera_model="${camera_model}" />
+      <parent link="${name}_color_frame" />
+      <child link="${name}_depth_frame"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_depth_frame">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.001"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.00001" ixy="0" ixz="0" iyy="0.00001" iyz="0" izz="0.00001"/>
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_depth_optical_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="${-90.0 * deg_to_rad} 0.0 ${-90.0 * deg_to_rad}" />
+      <parent link="${name}_depth_frame" />
+      <child link="${name}_depth_optical_frame"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_depth_optical_frame">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.001"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.00001" ixy="0" ixz="0" iyy="0.00001" iyz="0" izz="0.00001"/>
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <!-- frames of the rgb sensor -->
+    <joint name="${name}_color_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0.0 0.022 0.0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      <parent link="${name}_orbbec_aux_joint_frame" />
+      <child link="${name}_color_frame"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_color_frame">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.001"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.00001" ixy="0" ixz="0" iyy="0.00001" iyz="0" izz="0.00001"/>
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_color_optical_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="${-90.0 * deg_to_rad} 0.0 ${-90.0 * deg_to_rad}" />
+      <parent link="${name}_color_frame" />
+      <child link="${name}_color_optical_frame"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_color_optical_frame">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.001"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.00001" ixy="0" ixz="0" iyy="0.00001" iyz="0" izz="0.00001"/>
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <!-- Gazebo config -->
+    <xacro:openni_camera_gazebo_v0 name="${name}" />
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+      <origin xyz="0.0 0.022 0.0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      <parent link="${name}_link" />
+      <child link="${name}_color_frame"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_color_frame">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.001"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.00001" ixy="0" ixz="0" iyy="0.00001" iyz="0" izz="0.00001"/>
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_color_optical_joint" type="fixed">
+      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="${-90.0 * deg_to_rad} 0.0 ${-90.0 * deg_to_rad}" />
+      <parent link="${name}_color_frame" />
+      <child link="${name}_color_optical_frame"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_color_optical_frame">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.001"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.00001" ixy="0" ixz="0" iyy="0.00001" iyz="0" izz="0.00001"/>
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <!-- Gazebo -->
+    <xacro:openni_camera_gazebo_v0 name="${name}" />
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>
